title: Dashboard
description: The Dashboard provides a centralized overview of your active studies, cohorts, recent analyses, and platform notifications. It serves as the primary landing experience for researchers, offering quick access to in-progress work, data source status, and platform announcements.
tips: Pin frequently used cohorts, analyses, and concept sets to the Dashboard for faster navigation during active research projects.
Review platform notifications on the Dashboard regularly to stay informed of data refreshes, job completions, and system updates.
Use the Dashboard summary cards to monitor the status of long-running analysis jobs without navigating to the Analyses module.
Customize the Dashboard layout to prioritize the modules and data sources most relevant to your current research portfolio.
Check the Dashboard after new data ingestions to confirm that updated record counts are reflected in your cohort definitions.
